headline: How Dual Index Additions and Tariff Scrutiny At First Solar (FSLR) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In late June 2026, First Solar, Inc. was added to several Russell growth benchmarks, including the Russell Midcap Growth, Russell 1000 Growth, Russell 3000 Growth, and Russell 3000E Growth indices, following a period marked by strong policy-related tailwinds and ongoing legal scrutiny over its U.S. tariff disclosures. This combination of index inclusions and high-profile securities litigation puts First Solar at the center of investor attention, balancing questions about disclosure practices...
